title: elymus semicostatus
intro: Elymus semicostatus, also known as the semi-costate wheat grass, is a type of perennial grass that belongs to the Poaceae family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Elymus semicostatus include reducing inflammation and pain, improving digestion, and boosting the immune system. Elymus semicostatus can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal benefits.
